title: Jumbo Water Splash Balls - 10cm (Pack Of 2) - Assorted Pink, Blue & Green Colors - Ultimate Outdoor Fun & Pool Party Game
features: VIBRANT DESIGN Stand out at your next gathering with our visually stunning water splash balls, available in assorted pink, blue, and green colors. Each pack contains 2 balls, allowing for endless enjoyment and friendly competition among family and friends!

DURA BLE & SOFT MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality materials, our jumbo stunning water splash balls are designed to withstand energetic play and repeated use. Have a blast without worrying about accidental injury, as the soft material ensures safe and enjoyable play for both kids and adults alike.

GREAT SIZE: Dive into refreshing fun with our 10cm Jumbo Water Splash Balls, perfect for pool parties, beach outings, and outdoor playdates! The generous size ensures maximum water retention and delivers a fantastic soaking experience for everyone involved.
MULTIPURPOSE: Unleash the possibilities with these versatile splash balls that can double as a fun alternative to traditional water balloon fights or even football matches.

PERFECT FOR OUTDOOR FUN: Grab your Jumbo Water Splash Balls and make a splash at your next pool party, family reunion, or summer camp event! Easy to clean and pack away, these make a fantastic addition to any collection of outdoor toys and games.
description: Dive into a world of fun with our jumbo water splash balls! Measuring a whopping 10cm in diameter, this pack of two is sure to elevate your water-based frolic. Presented in an assortment of vibrant pink, blue, and green colors, these splash balls will brighten up any pool party or outdoor gathering. Crafted with durability in mind and designed for maximum water absorption, these splash balls guarantee hours of laughter and entertainment. Whether you're planning a pool party or merely looking for a refreshing game on a sweltering summer day, our Jumbo Water Splash Balls are the ultimate pick for outdoor fun.
